title: The Indian Nursing Council Act, 1947
full_text: The Indian Nursing Council Act, 1947 भारतीय नर्स परिषद् अधिनियम, 1947 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194748 Act Number: 48 Enactment Date: 1947-12-31 Act Year: 1947 Short Title: The Indian Nursing Council Act, 1947 Hindi Title: भारतीय नर्स परिषद् अधिनियम, 1947 Long Title: An Act to constitute an Indian Nursing Council. Ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare Department: Department of Health and Family Welfare Enforcement Date: 31-12-1947 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indian Nursing Council Act, 1947 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Interpretation. Section 3. Constitution and composition of the Council. Section 4. Incorporation of the Council. Section 5. Mode of elections. Section 6. Term of office and casual vacancies. Section 7. Meetings. Section 8. Officers, committees and servants of the Council. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. The Executive Committee. Section 10. Recognition of qualifications. Section 11. Effect of recognition. Section 12. Power to require information as to courses of study and training and examinations. Section 13. Inspections. Section 14. Withdrawal of recognition. Section 15. Mode of declaration. Section 15A. Indian Nurses Register. Section 15B. Supply of copies of State registers. Section 16. Power to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Repealed. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
